prompt: Review this snippet: 'import { List } from "antd"; export function TaskList({ tasks }) { return <List dataSource={tasks} renderItem={task => <List.Item>{task.title}</List.Item>} />; }'

assertions.name: identifies-deprecated-list
assertions.text: The review identifies that antd's List component is deprecated in the project.

assertions.name: suggests-semantic-html-panda
assertions.text: The review suggests using semantic HTML and Panda CSS instead of the List component.
